name: Playful AI in Professional Email: A Field Experiment on Tone and Recipient Engagement
summary: arXiv:2607.11749v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly reshaping workplace communication, yet whether AI-assisted writing changes how recipients actually behave, a...
description: arXiv:2607.11749v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly reshaping workplace communication, yet whether AI-assisted writing changes how recipients actually behave, and through what channel, remains unknown. Here, in a randomized crossover field experiment, 121 employees across six companies sent work emails under three conditions over three weeks: unaided writing...
author: Ziv Ben-Zion, Teddy Lazebnik
